circleSettings.title: Circle settings
circleSettings.description: Your account is automatically connected to a Circle when you create or join one. Easily invite friends by sharing the unique Circle code or link below. You'll receive a notification below when someone requests to join your Circle. If you'd like to leave, simply hit the 'Leave Circle' button.
circleSettings.leaveConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to leave this circle?
circleSettings.webhookDescription: Enter a webhook URL to receive notifications for circle events

accountSettings.title: Account Settings
accountSettings.dangerZoneDescription: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.

localization.title: Localization
localization.description: Customize language, date format, and regional preferences for your account.
localization.dateFormatDescription: Choose how dates should be displayed throughout the application
localization.firstDayOfWeekDescription: Select which day starts your week

sidepanel.title: Sidepanel Customization
sidepanel.description: Customize the layout and visibility of cards in the sidepanel. This section is only available on large screen devices such as tablets and desktops.

theme.title: Theme preferences
theme.description: Choose how the site looks to you. Select a single theme, or sync with your system and automatically switch between day and night themes.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.description: Update your display name and profile photo.
profile.photoUpdatedMessage: Your profile photo has been updated successfully!
profile.uploadFailedMessage: Failed to upload your photo. Please try again.
profile.profileUpdatedMessage: Your profile information has been saved successfully!
profile.updateFailedMessage: Unable to update your profile. Please check your connection and try again.

overview.title: Settings
overview.subtitle: Customize your experience and manage your account preferences

upgrade.title: Upgrade to Plus
upgrade.description: Unlock powerful features to enhance your productivity

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.description: Update your profile information, photo, display name, and timezone preferences.

circle.title: Circle Settings
circle.description: Manage your circle, invite members, and handle join requests.

account.title: Account Settings
account.description: Manage your subscription, change password, and account deletion options.

subaccounts.title: Managed Accounts
subaccounts.description: Create and manage sub accounts to log in and complete assigned tasks.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Configure push notifications, email alerts, and notification targets for tasks.

mfa.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
mfa.description: Add an extra layer of security with MFA using authenticator apps.

apitokens.title: API Tokens
apitokens.description: Generate and manage access tokens for third-party integrations and API access.

storage.title: Storage Settings
storage.description: Backup and restore your data, manage local storage and sync preferences.

sidepanel.title: Sidepanel Customization
sidepanel.description: Customize the layout and visibility of cards in the sidepanel interface.

theme.title: Theme Preferences
theme.description: Choose your preferred theme and configure dark/light mode settings.

localization.title: Localization
localization.description: Customize language, date format, time format, and regional preferences.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.description: Configure webhooks, real-time updates, and other advanced features for enhanced productivity.

developer.title: Developer Settings
developer.description: View technical information about authentication tokens, SSE connections, and debug data.
